query: Run a full SEO audit on https://staging.acmecorp.io and give me a scored report before we push to production Friday
Our blog at https://acme.com/blog isn't showing up in Google at all. Can you check the robots.txt, sitemap, canonical tags, and figure out what's blocking indexing?
Check the SEO health of our homepage — I want to know if the title tag length is good, meta description is within range, heading hierarchy is clean, and images have alt text
We're launching next week. Do a pre-launch SEO review on https://beta.ourapp.com — check technical SEO, on-page signals, structured data, OG tags, and Core Web Vitals
Google Search Console is showing crawl errors and our pages dropped out of the index last week. Audit https://shop.example.com to find what broke
Give me an SEO score for https://docs.myapi.dev — I need to know how it rates across technical SEO, content, structured data, social sharing, and performance
Is https://myportfolio.dev optimized for search? Check meta tags, heading structure, image alt coverage, JSON-LD, Open Graph, and tell me what's missing
Our competitor ranks higher for 'project management tool'. Audit our landing page at https://taskflow.io and tell me what SEO gaps we have compared to best practices
Lighthouse SEO score dropped from 95 to 62 after our last deploy. Audit https://app.saasco.com and find which checks are now failing
Check if https://events.nonprofit.org has all the right meta tags, proper canonical setup, and valid structured data before we promote the fundraising page on social media
Add JSON-LD Product schema to our /products/$id route with offers, price, and aggregateRating
Our LCP is 4.2 seconds on mobile — help me optimize the hero image loading and reduce render-blocking CSS
Set up og:title, og:description, and og:image meta tags on our blog post pages for better social sharing previews
Generate a sitemap.xml from our TanStack Router routes and include lastmod dates from the database
Write a robots.txt that allows Googlebot but blocks /admin, /api, and /internal paths
Run a WCAG 2.2 accessibility audit on our checkout flow and generate a remediation plan
Check if our site passes Core Web Vitals thresholds and fix any CLS issues caused by font loading
Add canonical URLs to all our blog pages to prevent duplicate content from paginated archives
Our PageSpeed Insights score is 45 on mobile — help me reduce JavaScript bundle size and optimize image formats to WebP
Create a responsive navbar with a mobile hamburger menu and sticky header for our marketing site
